network_summary: Dr. Roshan 'Dr. Ro' Parikh DDS MBA is the founder of Great Lakes Dental Partners (GLDP), a Shore Capital Partners PE-backed DSO recapitalized in 2015. He built the organization from a single 2008 Chicago practice to 35+ locations, 100+ dentists, $60M+ annual revenue. His original friendly-PC vehicle was 'CSG' (Chicagoland Smile Group). Three of the four AO-cluster locations appear on the GLDP public locator at confirmed addresses: Carillon Family Dental (Romeoville 60446), Fairview Dental Group (Westmont 60559). The fourth location — Palos Heights Dental Group at 12130 S Harlem Ave (60463) — is not on the GLDP locator (GLDP shows a different Palos Heights address at 7550 W College Dr) but Dr. Parikh is listed as practicing dentist there by DentalPlans. CSG Dental IV PC (1 E Wacker Dr, 60601) is the corporate admin/holding shell with 0 clinical providers; it is the NPPES-registered management address for the DSO, not a patient-facing clinic.

mso_platform_pe_evidence: Great Lakes Dental Partners is backed by Shore Capital Partners (PE recapitalization executed 2015 by Dr. Roshan Parikh). Shore Capital portfolio page: https://www.shorecp.com/companies/great-lakes-dental-partners. GLDP leadership page: https://www.greatlakesdentalpartners.com/company/leadership/. Dr. Parikh's bio confirms the PE recapitalization: https://www.roshanparikh.com/about. DSO platform structure confirmed (management services / DSO support organization providing services to 35+ partner locations per Shore Capital description).
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: CSG Dental IV PC at 1 E Wacker Dr Chicago (60601) has 0 clinical providers in NPPES — this is the corporate admin/holding address for the DSO management entity, not a patient-facing GP location. It should be flagged as a potential non-clinical shell for the downstream gate. The Palos Heights Dental Group at 12130 S Harlem Ave (60463) is not confirmed on the GLDP locator (GLDP shows 7550 W College Dr for Palos Heights); this may be an earlier separately-held Parikh practice or a practice that was acquired/exited — warrants address-level confirmation against GLDP records.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Roshan Parikh appears as NPPES authorized official on 4 GP organization NPIs across ZIPs 60446/60463/60559/60601. Documentary corroboration: (1) roshanparikh.com/about confirms Dr. Parikh founded Great Lakes Dental Partners, executed PE recapitalization with Shore Capital in 2015, grew to 35+ locations; (2) GLDP public locator (greatlakesdentalpartners.com/company/locations) lists Carillon Family Dental at 450 N Weber Rd Romeoville 60446 (exact address match) and Fairview Dental Group at 6317 Fairview Ave Westmont 60559 (exact address match); (3) Shore Capital portfolio page confirms GLDP as PE-backed portfolio company; (4) 'CSG Dental' = Chicagoland Smile Group, Parikh's original friendly-PC naming convention, with CSG Dental IV at the 1 E Wacker corporate address being the management entity. Result: branded_dso tier with pe_backed=true is fully supported by multiple documentary sources.
future_app_notes: 1. Confirm whether CSG Dental IV at 1 E Wacker should be excluded from GP denominator as a non-clinical corporate shell (0 providers). 2. Palos Heights Dental Group (12130 S Harlem, 60463) — verify whether this address is a former GLDP location, an early Parikh practice predating the DSO, or a currently-active GLDP partner not yet on the public locator. 3. GLDP locator shows 'College Drive Dental Associates' at 7550 W College Dr Palos Heights as the current GLDP Palos Heights location — check whether location_id 4f102207d0880e37 should be reconciled against that NPI. 4. Watch for GLDP's continued IL expansion — Shore Capital-backed platforms typically add 4-8 locations per year. 5. EIN 363607708 on Fairview Dental Care Group could be used to find other Parikh-linked entities sharing this EIN.
